raw_consumer_statement:
Rented a property on XXXX from XX/XX/year> to XX/XX/year>. Property found not cleaned including mice droppings and signs of mold around water damage. Host refused to cancel booking after we vacated on XX/XX/year>. XXXX stated I would be refunded for unstatyed nights. After the third call to XXXX asking for a status and XXXX saying they were working on it, I submitted a charge back via Barclays. On the XXXX call to XXXX after 4 hours I was told I was not eligible for a refund because the booking period had passed. 

I submitted the documents to Barclay 's who sent me a letter denying the chargeback citing the cleanliness clause and nonrefundable. The majority of the information in the documentation done by Barclay 's is inaccurate and is not what I told them. I am currently unable to speak to a supervisor as they request any documentation is faxed or mailed.

However neither Barclay 's or XXXX have provided the policy on vermin/mice despite my repeated requests as that falls out of general cleanliness scope.
